    Terrance Gore Passes Away
    Longtime Royals outfielder and pinch-running specialist Terrance Gore passed away yesterday at age 34.  According to a social media post from Gore’s wife Britney, Gore unexpectedly passed following what was supposed to be a routine surgical procedure. A veteran of eight Major League seasons, Gore had one of the more unique careers of any player…  ( 14 min )

  • Open

    Starbucks Welcomes 2026 Valentine's Day Drinks
    Starbucks debuts two new Valentine's Day beverages for a limited time alongside two new permanent matcha beverages. The Valentine's Day drinks include: - White Chocolate Strawberry Cream Cold Brew - Inspired by chocolate-covered strawberries, the drink features cold brew coffee and vanilla-flavored syrup, topped with White Chocolate Strawberry Cream Cold Foam and chocolate curls. While it's available, the White Chocolate Strawberry Cream Cold Foam can be added to any cold beverage. - Strawberry Shortcake Frappuccino - A Creme Frappuccino swirled with strawberry puree and cinnamon dolce syrup, topped with whipped cream and a caramel-sugar sprinkle.  While the Valentine's Day beverages are here for a limited time only, the two new matcha drinks are available year-round and include: - Iced Double Berry Matcha - Layers of strawberry puree, matcha, and Raspberry Cream Cold Foam served over ice. Raspberry Cream Cold Foam can be added to any cold beverage year-round, and the raspberry syrup used to make it is also a permanent customization option. - Iced Banana Bread Matcha - Matcha, brown sugar syrup, milk, and ice, topped with Banana Cream Cold Foam and a caramel crunch topping.  Photo via Starbucks. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

  • Open

    Sea Dog and Fish 'n Chips Return to Wienerschnitzel
    The Sea Dog and Fish 'n Chips are back at Wienerschnitzel in time for the 2026 Lenten/seafood season. The Sea Dog (pictured) is like a hot dog but with a fish filet instead of a frankfurter. Specifically, it features a battered and fried fish filet nestled in a steamed hot dog bun with American cheese and tartar sauce. Prices vary, but it costs $4.99 at my local Wienerschnitzel in Los Angeles. Wienerschnitzel's Fish 'n Chips features two or four battered and deep-fried fish filets accompanied by French fries and tartar sauce. A two-piece order costs $6.59 near me, while a four-piece order costs $11.99. Both seasonal Lent-friendly items are now available for a limited time. Photo via Wienerschnitzel. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )

    2026 Super Bowl Deals and Specials
    The Super Bowl is coming up this Sunday, February 8, 2026, and in case you're looking to save some money on food for your game day spread, here's a list of 2026 Super Bowl deals and specials (as well as some day-after-the-Super-Bowl deals): - 7-Eleven - On February 8 and February 9, 2026, 7Rewards and Speedy Rewards members can buy a whole pizza and get another for $3. It also offers a limited-time $5 Meal Deal, which includes two pizza slices and a 20-ounce Coke, Sprite, Pepsi, or Mountain Dew beverage through March 3, 2026. - Applebee's - On February 8, 2026, you can get 20 free Boneless Wings with any $40 online purchase made through the Applebee's website or mobile app using the code "SBWINGS26". - BJ's Restaurant & Brewhouse - Through February 8, 2026, BJ's is offering the Pizza & Wi…  ( 16 min )
    Jimmy John's Launches New Meal Diamond Meal
    Jimmy John's has partnered with Hellmann's to launch the new Meal Diamond Deal for a limited time at participating locations nationwide through February 22, 2026. The Meal Diamond Deal features a Ham & Three Cheese Melt, chips, and a regular fountain drink for a price that varies by location. A Meal Diamond Meal with a regular-sized sub costs $12.69 near me in Los Angeles (it's $21.99 with a Giant sub). A Ham & Three Cheese Melt is a sub featuring double ham, cheddar, parmesan, and provolone, served on toasted French bread. It normally costs $11.69 near me, which means the deal nets you chips and a drink for $1. That's the same as a "make a sandwich a combo for $1" deal that Jimmy John's has been offering since last month (prices may vary by location). The name of the meal requires some explanation: During this year's Super Bowl, Hellmann's will be airing a commercial starring comedian Andy Samberg as "Meal Diamond," a riff on musical artist Neil Diamond, singing "Sweet Sandwich Time," a parody of Neil Diamond's hit song, "Sweet Caroline." You can view the longform version of the ad below (a shortened 30-second spot will air during the game): Photo via Jimmy John's. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

    Aldi Finds for February 2026
    Grocery store chain Aldi has released its schedule of limited-time Aldi Finds for February 2026. Highlights include some Valentine's Day items and St. Patrick's Day-themed offerings. Here's what the lineup looks like: Available starting February 4, 2026: Specially Selected Heart-Shaped Macarons (pictured) - $3.86 Specially Selected Valentine's Macarons - $4.98 Priano Italian Style Cookies - $3.89 Sundae Shoppe Italian Gelato Cups - $3.99 Emporium Selection Valentine's Day Cheese Assortment - $3.99 Specially Selected Smoked Mozzarella Ravioli - $2.99 Specially Selected Authentic Italian Pizzas - $3.99 Specially Selected Seafood Bisque - $8.99 Tuscan Garden Muffuletta Olive Salad - $4.99 Available starting February 11, 2026: Mama Cozzi's Pizza Kitchen Wood Fired Pesto or Pepperoni Pizza - $2.84 Savoritz Trail Mix Cracker - $2.99 Breakfast Best Stuffed Waffles - $5.95 Breakfast Best Breakfast Meatballs - $6.49 Season's Choice Seaside or Green Dream Smoothie Blends - $6.99 Specially Selected Classic Cookies - $3.99 Barissimo Bourbon Pecan or Amaretto Cups - $4.59 Bake Shop Paczki (Polish donuts) - $3.69 Simply Nature Organic Hemp Seeds - $5.49 Available starting February 18, 2026: Priano Bronze Cut Orzo or Stars - $1.99 Reganno Ditalini - $1.49 Emporium Selection Irish Cheese Truckle Assortment - $3.99 Bremer Onion Pierogies - $9.99 Season's Choice Cheesy Potato Tots - $4.29 Bremer Philly Cheesesteak or Ham & Swiss Sandwich - $7.99 Available starting February 25, 2026: Aldi Irish Soda or Beer Bread Mix - $2.49 St. Patrick's Day Trail Mixes - $4.89 Emporium Selection St. Patrick's Cheese Assortment - $3.99 Photo via Aldi. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

  • Open

    KFC Introduces New Wedges and Queso Dip
    KFC launches new Wedges and Queso Dip as a shareable side ahead of the Super Bowl this Sunday. Available as a digital exclusive on the KFC website and mobile app at participating locations nationwide, Wedges and Queso Dip features a large side of crispy, seasoned potato wedges paired with 16 ounces of queso dip (something that is not normally on the KFC menu). Prices vary, but my local KFC in Los Angeles charges $8.99 for an order. For a limited time, the fried chicken chain is also offering a "20 wings for $20" deal to its KFC Rewards members. Photo via KFC. Read more at Brand Eating!
    Chick-fil-A Tests New Avocado Sriracha BLT Sandwich and Sweet Chili Lime Crunch Sandwich
    Chick-fil-A is testing two new sandwiches for a limited time: the Avocado Sriracha BLT Sandwich and the Sweet Chili Lime Crunch Sandwich. The Avocado Sriracha BLT Sandwich (pictured) is testing at participating locations in Oklahoma City, OK, and features a crispy-fried Original Chicken filet served with green leaf lettuce, tomato, seasoned avocado mash, and applewood-smoked bacon on Sriracha Swirl Toast (which is toasted bread swirled with a "sriracha style seasoning blend"). Cayenne Ranch Sauce is included on the side for those who want to add more heat. The sandwich is also available with a spicy or grilled filet. Prices range from $7.69 (for the Original Chicken filet) to $8.65 (for the grilled filet). ️The Sweet Chili Lime Crunch Sandwich is available at participating locations in the Piedmont Triad area (Greensboro, High Point, and Winston-Salem) of North Carolina. It features a crispy-fried Original Chicken filet, Ginger Lime Cool Crunch (a mix of cabbage, kale, and ginger lime dressing), and sweet chili sauce, served on a toasted, buttered bun. It can also be ordered with a spicy or grilled chicken filet. Prices range from $6.19 to $7.09, depending on your choice of filet. Both sandwiches are available, while supplies last, through March 7, 2026. Photo via Chick-fil-A. Read more at Brand Eating!
    Taco Bell Brings Back Crispy Chicken Nuggets with New Hidden Valley Diablo Ranch
    Crispy Chicken Nuggets make a limited-time return to Taco Bell and are joined by new Hidden Valley Diablo Ranch Sauce. The new dipping sauce features the "signature, creamy flavor of Hidden Valley Ranch with the smoky, rich heat of Taco Bell's iconic Diablo sauce." Hidden Valley Ranch is the original ranch dressing, while Diablo sauce is Taco Bell's spiciest regularly available sauce. Taco Bell's Crispy Chicken Nuggets feature pieces of white-meat chicken covered in a crispy-fried breading that includes flakes of tortilla. The suggested price for a 5-piece order is $4.99, and a 10-piece order costs $7.99. Photo via Taco Bell. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )

    Royals, Vinnie Pasquantino Avoid Arbitration

  • Open

    Baskin-Robbins Brings Back Love Potion #31 Along with New Love Potion #31 Cappy
    Love Potion #31 ice cream returns to Baskin-Robbins as its February 2026 Flavor of the Month and is featured in the new Love Potion #31 Cappy. The ice cream parlor chain also welcomes two new ice cream cakes for the 2026 Valentine's Day season. Love Potion #31 features white chocolate and raspberry-flavored ice creams with raspberry swirls, chocolate‑flavored chips, and raspberry‑filled chocolate hearts. The new Love Potion #31 Cappy features Love Potion #31 blended with Arabica coffee, topped with whipped cream and a fudge drizzle. The new Valentine's Day ice cream cakes include the Vintage Heart Cake and Vintage Cherry Cake. The Vintage Heart Cake is a heart-shaped cake featuring a light pink frosted base trimmed with pink, red, and white borders and dotted with frosted hearts. The Vintage Cherry Cake is also a heart-shaped cake, but is decorated differently with "cherries, romantic piping, and heart details." Both cakes can be made with your choice of ice cream and cake. They come in two sizes: a small size meant for two to four people and a large size to feed up to 12 people. The Valentine's Day-themed cakes, ice cream, and Cappy are now available for a limited time nationwide. Photo via Baskin-Robbins. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Jack in the Box Serves Up New Protein Bowls
    Jack in the Box bolsters its rice bowl and wrap offerings with the addition of the new Chicken Fajita Protein Bowl (it's also now referring to its rice bowls as "protein bowls") and the Fajita Jack Wrap. It also adds Jack's Sugar Cookie and Red Bull Peach Edition. The Chicken Fajita Protein Bowl features crispy-fried or grilled chicken served over white or brown rice with grilled onions, roasted corn, black beans, cheddar cheese & Chipotle Ranch. It joins the Chicken Teriyaki Protein Bowl on the menu.  The Chicken Teriyaki Protein Bowl features crispy-fried or grilled chicken served over white or brown rice, accompanied by broccoli, carrots, and a teriyaki sauce. Both bowls start at $7.69. They can also be ordered as part of a combo meal that includes an egg roll and a drink. The Fajita Jack Wrap consists of crispy-fried or grilled chicken strips, shredded lettuce, shredded cheddar, grilled onions, tomato, and Chipotle Ranch wrapped in a warm tortilla. Pricing starts at $3 (you can also mix and match any Jack Wrap at 2 for $6). Jack's Sugar Cookie is a buttery sugar cookie decorated with icing in one of four Jack faces. The price tag on the cookie starts at $2.49. Red Bull Peach Edition is offered at Jack in the Box by the can and as part of a Red Bull Infusion beverage mixed with either strawberry & tangerine syrup or mixed berry syrup. Prices start at $2.99 for a can and $4.99 for an Infusion. Photo via Jack in the Box. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Krispy Kreme's 2026 Valentine's Day Donuts Arrive
    Krispy Kreme is ready for Valentine's Day this month with the arrival of its 2026 Valentine's Day Collection of donuts. This year's Valentine's donuts include: - New I Love You a Choco-Lot Donut - A heart-shaped donut filled with chocolate-flavored Kreme, dipped in red vanilla-flavored icing, and topped with a chocolate icing ribbon and bow.     - New Teddy Bear Cookies & Kreme Donut - A heart-shaped donut filled with Cookies & Kreme, dipped in chocolate icing, and topped with a white chocolate bear face.  - New You're Berry Sweet Donut - A heart-shaped donut filled with Kreme, dipped in strawberry-flavored icing, and topped with a red vanilla-flavored drizzle and an XOXO sugar piece.   - New Sprinkled with Love Donut - An Original Glazed donut piped with buttercream-flavored frosting and heart sprinkles.  The donuts are available individually or by the dozen in a Valentine's Day-themed box at participating locations across the US starting Tuesday, February 3, through Valentine's Day (Saturday, February 14, 2026). You can also find them in a six-pack at select grocery retailers. In addition to the introduction of this year's Valentine's Day donuts, Krispy Kreme is offering a Groundhog Day deal through Tuesday, February 3, 2026, where you can get $6 off any Assorted Dozen at participating locations. Photo via Krispy Kreme. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )
    Spicy Jack Quesadilla Returns to Del Taco
    The Spicy Jack Quesadilla has returned to Del Taco for a limited time at participating locations chain-wide. The Spicy Jack Quesadilla features shredded spicy Jack cheese and tangy green sauce (AKA salsa verde) folded in a flour tortilla and grilled. A Spicy Jack Chicken Quesadilla and its meal are also available. The Spicy Jack Chicken Quesadilla features marinated grilled chicken added to the Spicy Jack Quesadilla, while the Spicy Jack Chicken Quesadilla Meal pairs the quesadilla with crinkle-cut fries and a drink. Both quesadillas are available through March 23, 2026. Photo via Del Taco. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )

  • Open

    Crumbl Bakes New Fudge Brownie Football Cookie
    Ahead of the Super Bowl, Crumbl bakes a new Fudge Brownie Football Cookie as part of its weekly rotation from February 2 through February 7, 2026. Here's what this week's limited-time lineup looks like: - Fudge Brownie Football Cookie - A brownie-inspired cookie topped with fudge frosting and white cream cheese "football laces." - Dubai Cookie - Returning for yet another week, the Dubai Cookie is a brownie cookie layered with a crunchy kataifi and pistachio filling, finished with milk chocolate and a drizzle of pistachio cream. - Peanut Butter Cup Brownie featuring Reese's - A brownie topped with peanut butter mousse, a chocolate drizzle, and Reese's Peanut Butter Cup pieces. - Caramel Shortbread Cookie featuring Twix - A shortbread-inspired cookie filled with Twix pieces, topped with caramel, milk chocolate, and chopped Twix pieces. - Confetti Cake Cookie - A sugar cookie with confetti sprinkles, topped with pink vanilla cream cheese frosting and more confetti sprinkles. Photo via Crumbl. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )
    Asiago Bagel Stacks are Back at Panera
    Panera reintroduces Asiago Bagel Stacks as a permanent addition to its lunch and dinner menu. They are joined by a new, limited-time trio of Breakfast Bagel Stacks. The permanent Asiago Bagel Stacks include: - Chicken Roma Asiago Bagel Stack - Grilled chicken, melty fresh mozzarella, vine-ripened tomatoes, chopped basil, fresh arugula, Green Goddess dressing, salt,, pepper, and a garlic aioli drizzle on an Asiago Bagel.​ - Spicy Steak Asiago Bagel Stack - Marinated steak, melty provolone, creamy salsa verde spread, fresh arugula, red onions, and sweet peppers on an Asiago Bagel.​ As for the new, limited-time Breakfast Bagel Stacks (breakfast items are available before 11AM), they include: - Wake-Up BLT Asiago Everything Bagel Stack (pictured) - Applewood-smoked bacon, scrambled egg, vine-ripened tomatoes, fresh arugula, salt, pepper, and cheesy benedict sauce, served on a new Asiago Everything Bagel. The new bagel is a bagel baked with "sharp and tangy" asiago cheese and an everything bagel seasoning made of sesame seeds, poppy seeds, dried garlic, dried onion, and salt. - Farmhouse Duo Asiago Bagel Stack - Applewood-smoked bacon, sausage patty, scrambled egg, salt, pepper, and cheesy benedict sauce, served on an Asiago Bagel. - Sausage & Egg Asiago Bagel Stack -A sausage patty, scrambled egg, melty American cheese, salt, pepper, and garlic aioli, served on an Asiago Bagel. Other new items at Panera include: - Asiago Croissant Twists - Two all-butter croissant twists topped with asiago cheese. - Toasted Caprese Focaccia - Melty fresh mozzarella, vine-ripened tomatoes, fresh arugula, basil pesto spread, salt, pepper, and balsamic glaze, served on Black Pepper Focaccia. The new Asiago Everything Bagel can also be purchased on its own. Photo via Panera Bread. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

    Chick-fil-A Adds Frosted Sodas and Floats to Permanent Menu
    Chick-fil-A welcomes new Frosted Sodas and Floats as a permanent part of its beverage menu. Frosted Sodas feature your choice of fountain beverage blended with Icedream frozen dairy dessert, while Floats sees your choice of fountain beverage layered with Icedream frozen dairy dessert. Fountain beverage options at Chick-fil-A include Coca-Cola, Dr Pepper, Sprite, Fanta, Powerade, Hi-C, Barq's Root Beer, and more. Photo via Chick-fil-A. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
